rust.core_v61_full_backend_cutover_plan.summary: Adds the non-mutating full Rust backend cutover plan after production-readiness while preserving WebUI/UX and requiring Python fallback.

rust.core_v62_full_backend_cutover_execu.title: Rust Core v6.2 Full Rust Backend Cutover Execution Contract
rust.core_v62_full_backend_cutover_execu.summary: Adds the non-mutating full Rust backend cutover execution contract after v6.1 cutover planning while preserving WebUI/UX and Python fallback.

rust.core_v63_python_backend_retirement_.title: Rust Core v6.3 Python Backend Retirement Plan
rust.core_v63_python_backend_retirement_.summary: Adds a non-mutating Python backend retirement planning gate after the full Rust backend cutover execution contract while keeping WebUI/UX unchanged and Python fallback mandatory.

rust.core_v64_rust_backend_production_en.title: Rust Core v6.4 Rust Backend Production Enablement Contract
rust.core_v64_rust_backend_production_en.summary: Adds a non-mutating Rust backend production enablement contract after Python backend retirement planning while keeping Python fallback and WebUI/UX unchanged.

rust.core_v65_python_backend_removal_exe.title: Rust Core v6.5 Python Backend Removal Execution Contract
rust.core_v65_python_backend_removal_exe.summary: Adds the first explicit Python backend removal execution contract while keeping Python fallback, WebUI/UX, and all mutation guards in place.

rust.core_v66_full_rust_backend_removal_.title: Rust Core v6.6 Full Rust Backend Removal Rehearsal
rust.core_v66_full_rust_backend_removal_.summary: Final non-mutating rehearsal before a future v7.0 actual full Rust backend cutover / Python backend removal package.

rust.core_v70_full_backend_production_cu.title: Rust Core v7.0 Full Rust Backend Production Cutover
rust.core_v70_full_backend_production_cu.summary: First actual full-Rust-backend production cutover package, preserving WebUI/UX and requiring final server/rollback gates before Python backend removal is allowed.

rust.core_v71_full_backend_production_ve.title: Rust Core v7.1 Full Rust Backend Production Verifier / Python Retirement Guard
rust.core_v71_full_backend_production_ve.summary: Adds the post-cutover Rust production verifier and guarded Python backend retirement executor while preserving WebUI/UX/static assets.

rust.core_v72_full_rust_backend_post_ret.title: Rust Core v7.2 Full Rust Backend Post-Retirement Verifier
rust.core_v72_full_rust_backend_post_ret.summary: Verifies full Rust backend production after guarded Python backend retirement while preserving WebUI/UX and rollback safety.

rust.core_v73_full_rust_backend_steady_s.title: Rust Core v7.3 Full Rust Backend Steady-State Guard
rust.core_v73_full_rust_backend_steady_s.summary: Adds a post-retirement steady-state guard for full Rust backend production, verifying Rust runtime authority, no Python drift, unchanged WebUI/UX, rollback readiness, and server healthchecks.

rust.core_v731_steady_state_guard_hotfix.title: Rust Core v7.3.1 Steady-State Guard Hotfix
rust.core_v731_steady_state_guard_hotfix.summary: Fixes the aggregate self-test steady-state guard fixture by adding the missing WebUI static assets preserved gate.

rust.core_v732_steady_state_guard_hotfix.title: Rust Core v7.3.2 Steady-State Guard Self-Test Hotfix
rust.core_v732_steady_state_guard_hotfix.summary: Fixes the aggregate self-test steady-state guard fixture by including both WebUI static asset path and preservation gates.

rust.core_v733_steady_state_guard_hotfix.title: Rust Core v7.3.3 Steady-State Guard Hotfix
rust.core_v733_steady_state_guard_hotfix.summary: Fixes aggregate self-test steady-state guard by adding the missing top-level webui_ux_unchanged gate alongside static asset preservation gates.

rust.core_v734_steady_state_guard_hotfix.title: Rust Core v7.3.4 Steady-State Guard Hotfix
rust.core_v734_steady_state_guard_hotfix.summary: Adds missing python_backend_rollback_package_ready to the aggregate steady-state guard self-test fixture.
